en_title: GTA 6's Lack of a PC Port Isn't Out of Greed, According to a Former Rockstar Producer
cn_title: 前Rockstar制作人：《GTA6》PC版延期非因贪婪
subtitle: 先做主机版是技术取舍
opus_summary: 前Rockstar制作人John Ricchio解释，先从性能受限的主机开发再扩展到PC，比从PC向下缩减更容易；端口是否制作还取决于人员、成本与资源优先级，而非针对PC平台。

paragraphs.en: A former Rockstar Games producer has explained why the developer's PC versions usually come long after the console version.
paragraphs.cn: 一名前Rockstar制作人解释了该开发商为何通常在主机版推出很久后才发布PC版。

paragraphs.en: In an interview with YouTuber KiwiTalkz , former Rockstar Games producer John Ricchio explained that starting with consoles and going to PC is actually easier. Because consoles are more constrained, it's simpler to start with the less powerful option and scale up, as opposed to building a game for PC and trying to scale it down.
paragraphs.cn: 前Rockstar制作人John Ricchio接受YouTube博主KiwiTalkz采访时解释，先做主机再转向PC其实更容易。主机限制更多，因此从性能较弱的平台起步再向上扩展，比先为PC开发、之后尝试向下缩减更简单。

paragraphs.en: "It's always better to start with the constraints and then extend," said Ricchio. "Because shrinking is a lot harder than extending. It's way harder to make your game performant than it is to just be like 'Oh, we've got extra room? Cool, we can deoptimize or make things more shiny.'"
paragraphs.cn: Ricchio说：「从限制条件出发再扩展总是更好，因为缩减比扩展困难得多。让游戏达到性能要求，要比『哦，我们有额外空间？很好，可以放松优化，或者让画面更漂亮』难得多。」

paragraphs.en: He also noted that when he was at Rockstar in the early 2010s, many conversations were had over the value of resources. For instance, there was a PC build of Red Dead Redemption during the game's development, even though . However, the team had to decide whether a PC version of Red Dead Redemption was more valuable than putting people on Grand Theft Auto 5.
paragraphs.cn: 他还指出，自己在2010年代初效力Rockstar时，团队经常讨论资源价值。例如，《荒野大镖客：救赎》开发期间确实有PC版本，尽管[原文此处缺失内容]。不过团队必须判断，制作《荒野大镖客：救赎》PC版，是否比把人手投入《侠盗猎车手5》更有价值。

paragraphs.en: “It’s always those conversations," he said. "It’s never any specific, you know, anti-any platform. It’s just, is it worth spending the time and effort to get something running on Switch, or something like that, or Wii, who knows? And I think you have to make those calls per game, and in a lot of cases there are legitimate hardware limitations, right?
paragraphs.cn: 他说：「讨论的始终是这些问题，从来不是专门反对某个平台。问题只是，是否值得花时间精力让某款游戏在Switch之类的平台，或者Wii上运行，谁知道呢？我认为必须针对每款游戏作决定，而且很多情况下确实存在硬件限制，对吧？」

paragraphs.en: "But as time has gone on, I feel like the consoles are definitely closer, so it doesn’t quite feel as bad, but it just becomes about, ‘If you’re working on that, you’re not working on something else,' usually. And so if you’re spending money on that, you’re not spending money on something else. And so that’s where the business case has to be there. There has to be enough of a business reason to do some of those ports, or the lift has to be so light that it’s like, ‘Oh, it’ll be super easy to do.' And it’s rarely super light; there’s always something that you’ve got to do.”
paragraphs.cn: 「但随着时间推移，我觉得各主机之间确实更接近了，所以情况没那么糟。不过通常问题会变成：『如果你在做这个，就没有在做别的。』把钱花在这里，就不能花在别处，因此必须有成立的商业理由。制作某些移植版必须有足够商业依据，或者工作量小到『哦，这会非常容易』。但工作量很少真的那么小，总有些事情必须处理。」

paragraphs.en: Some fans hoped that the increased popularity of PC over the last decade would push Rockstar to have a PC version of GTA 6 on day one. Unfortunately, that's not the case . Of course, Rockstar has thousands of employees and close to a dozen studios, but when you're trying to make one of the most ambitious games of all-time, Ricchio's argument about where to put resources likely remains a factor. It's likely an all-hands on deck operation to make sure the game comes out on time and in good shape.
paragraphs.cn: 一些粉丝希望PC过去十年人气增长能促使Rockstar让《GTA6》PC版首日同步推出，但事实并非如此。当然，Rockstar拥有数千名员工和近十家工作室，可当团队试图制作史上最具野心的游戏之一时，Ricchio关于资源投向的论点可能仍是重要因素。为了确保游戏按时且以良好状态推出，团队很可能需要全员投入。

paragraphs.en: Grand Theft Auto 6 will release on November 19th for Xbox Series X|S and PS5.
paragraphs.cn: 《侠盗猎车手6（GTA6）》将于11月19日登陆XBOX Series X|S和PS5。
